```console
$ docker pull friendica@sha256:a3cf0284f74ba57d1195b0d4c98714311b9ce91b7c133988ec54745d3f5f4fc3

-	Manifest MIME: `application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json`

```console
$ docker pull friendica@sha256:a3cf0284f74ba57d1195b0d4c98714311b9ce91b7c133988ec54745d3f5f4fc3
```

-	Manifest MIME: `application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json`
-	Total Size: **201.4 MB (201440725 bytes)**
